title: desktop-ai-agent RPC
description: JSON-RPC 2.0 contract between Tauri frontend and Python daemon. Phase 0 covers only session.send_text and agent.say/agent.say_end; methods for voice, tool confirmation, settings, scheduler, memory and llm diagnostics will be added as each phase lands. See docs/spec-detailed.md §5 for the full surface.

auth.description: Client sets Sec-WebSocket-Protocol to 'bearer.<token>'. The daemon also accepts an Authorization: Bearer <token> header when the caller can set one.

binary.description: Reserved for audio streams; first byte is a tag (0x01=mic PCM, 0x02=tts PCM), followed by a u64 LE sequence number, followed by payload.

agent.say.description: Streaming chunk of agent speech. Emotion is used by the character feature to pick a sprite. is_thinking=true marks chunks that should render in the bubble's thinking layer, not the main text.

agent.say_end.description: Marks the end of one turn's stream. Subsequent agent.say events belong to a new message.
